nasb.text: They shall be holy to their God and not profane the name of their God, for they present the offerings by fire to the Lord, the food of their God; so they shall be holy.

esv.text: They shall be holy to their God and not profane the name of their God. For they offer the Lord’s food offerings, the bread of their God; therefore they shall be holy.

cnv.text: 他們要成為聖，歸向他們的　神，不可褻瀆他們　神的名，因為他們奉獻耶和華的火祭，他們　神的食物，所以他們要成為聖。

ccb.text: 他们要做上帝的圣洁之民，不可亵渎我的名。因为他们负责献我的火祭，即我的食物，所以要保持圣洁。
